profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Asuransi Bintang Tbk engages in general insurance and reinsurance business in Indonesia. It offers home, fire, travel, micro, motor vehicle, property, engineering, cargo, marine hull and machinery, personal accident, and other insurance products. The company also provides services, such as policy status check, vehicle and non-vehicle claims, payment, and personal data change and policy extension. PT Asuransi Bintang Tbk was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
